chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D – 2214 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). D/O Matter 1. For order on CMA No.9136/2018 (Review) 2. For order on CMA No.9137/2018 (Review).-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.04.2024 None present for applicants. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, A.A.G. Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. On the last two dates of hearing, neither the applicants were in attendance nor their counsel and today the position is same. On 04.03.2024 the matter was adjourned as an indulgence and last chance. It appears that the applicants have lost interest in pursuing the applications which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
